content:
# Session 27 (iter-027) ‚Äî summary

## Metadata
- **Target:** SNAP-S0 graded-RING ASSEMBLY (the deliverable, Stacks 01CV) ‚Äî build the `GMonoid`/`GSemiring`
  on `m ‚Ü¶ Œì(X, L^{‚äóm})` ‚àÄL, on top of the now-complete B1‚ÄìB7 associativity chain.
- **Outcome:** DELIVERED, axiom-clean ‚àÄL. 4 new decls landed; 0 new sorries. SNAP cone sorry 3 ‚Üí 3
  (the 3 deferred comm sorries are untouched; the deliverable was unscaffolded new construction, not a sorry).
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (3494 ‚Üí 3571 lines).

## Delivered (all axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, verified first-hand by me)
- **`sectionGradedRing_gmonoid` (`@[reducible]`, L3437)** ‚Äî `GradedMonoid.GMonoid (sectionDeg L)`. The
  three graded-monoid axioms = the hypothesis-free coherence clauses `sectionsMul_one_mul` (B2),
  `sectionsMul_mul_one` (B3), `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7), each routed through `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`
  (transport-mediated eq ‚Üí dependent-pair eq). `gnpow` takes the Mathlib default (mirrors `TensorPower.Basic`).
- **`sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` (`@[reducible]`, L3456)** ‚Äî `DirectSum.GSemiring (sectionDeg L)`. Extends
  gmonoid with bilinearity (`mul_zero`/`zero_mul`/`mul_add`/`add_mul`) + `natCast`. ‚àÄL, no `[IsInvertible]`.
- **`sectionGradedRing_semiring_nonempty` (L3479)** ‚Äî `Nonempty (Semiring (DirectSum ‚Ñï (sectionDeg L)))`.
  The sanity confirmation: the GSemiring assembles a genuine `Semiring` on `‚äï_m Œì(X,L^{‚äóm})`.
- **`moduleTensorPowAdd` (L3489)** ‚Äî STRETCH foundation iso `L^{‚äói} ‚äó (F ‚äó L^{‚äój}) ‚âÖ F ‚äó L^{‚äó(i+j)}`
  (reassociate + braid `L^{‚äói}` past `F` + merge via `tensorPowAdd`). Braiding is between distinct objects
  ‚áí no invertibility needed.

## Key technical findings (with the actual errors)
1. **`DirectSum.GSemiring` import + `@[reducible]`.** First attempt failed: `Unknown constant DirectSum.GSemiring`
   (it lives in `Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Ring`, not transitively imported) + "class-type def must be marked
   `@[reducible]`". Fix: add the import; mark both class-valued defs `@[reducible]` (legitimate ‚Äî carrier
   depends on the free `L`, cannot be a global instance; lean-auditor confirmed).
2. **Bilinearity needs `erw`, not `rw`/`simp only`.** `simp only [gMul_mul_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_zero,
   map_zero]` left `Œì(Œº)(sectionsMul(a ‚äó‚Çú 0)) = 0` unsolved ‚Äî the `TensorProduct.tmul_zero` rewrite does not
   fire under `simp only` across the `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`/`DFunLike` coercion. Working tactic:
   `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]` ‚Äî push `0`/`+` through the
   `TensorProduct` step, then through BOTH `ModuleCat` morphisms (two `map_zero`/`map_add`).
3. **The `Semiring` sanity check must be a `Nonempty` theorem, not an `example`.** `example (L) : Semiring
   (‚®Å m, sectionDeg L m)` failed three ways: ‚®Å index binder elaboration (`m : ?‚Üí?`, then `unexpected token`,
   then `(_ √ó Type)`), then `DirectSum ‚Ñï (sectionDeg L)` form triggered "failed to compile, consider
   `noncomputable`" (an `example` is elaborated as a def ‚Üí codegen on the noncomputable carrier). Final:
   `theorem ... : Nonempty (Semiring (DirectSum ‚Ñï (sectionDeg L))) := ‚ü®letI := ...; inferInstance‚ü©` ‚Äî the
   `Nonempty` wrapper avoids both codegen and global-instance registration.
4. **`natCast = n ‚Ä¢ (GOne.one : sectionDeg L 0)`**, laws `zero_nsmul`/`succ_nsmul`.

## Not delivered (documented STRETCH / deferred ‚Äî out of deliverable scope)
- **`sectionGradedModule_gmodule`** (Gmodule on the twisted family) ‚Äî foundation iso `moduleTensorPowAdd`
  laid, but `Gmodule.mul_smul` = braided **hexagon** coherence (braiding `L^{‚äói}` past `F` intrinsic); no
  Mathlib tactic discharges it; multi-iter obstacle. Left unscaffolded.
- **3 comm sorries** (L3506/3520/3541: `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`,
  `sectionsMul_mul_comm`) ‚Äî `[IsInvertible L]`-gated, FALSE ‚àÄ general L, no consumer. Untouched, honest,
  un-weakened (lean-auditor confirmed).

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched ‚Äî prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter027` ‚Äî **0 critical / 0 major / 1 minor.** All 4 new decls genuine; `@[reducible]`
  legitimate; bilinearity `erw` correct; no laundering / no `maxHeartbeats` inflation. 3 sorries honest +
  un-weakened + gated; the `sectionsMul_mul_comm` inline "FALSE for arbitrary L" comment = mathematical
  documentation, not an excuse-comment. Minor: gmonoid + gsemiring share the blueprint label
  `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`. Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter027.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter027` ‚Äî **PASS, 0 must-fix, 3 minor.** `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`
  faithfully + un-weakenedly realised (‚àÄL, no `[IsInvertible]`, axiom-clean, name/signature exact match).
  `gmonoid`/`semiring_nonempty`/`moduleTensorPowAdd` acceptably folded into neighbouring prose (no own block
  required). **Confirmed `\leanok` IS warranted** ‚Äî it is per-decl sorry-freeness, NOT transitive-`\uses`
  closure, so the still-sorried comm clause inside `\uses{lem:sectionMul_coherent}` does not block it. Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter027.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`: **added `\leanok`** to the statement
  block AND the proof block (manual override). Justification: the Lean decl `sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` is
  per-decl sorry-free + axiom-clean (`lean_verify` confirmed by me: `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`);
  `sync_leanok` (iter-027, added 0 / removed 0) left it bare because its bundled `\uses{lem:sectionMul_coherent}`
  still carries the sorried comm clause ‚Äî but `\leanok` semantics are per-decl, not transitive-closure (both
  verifiers confirmed). This is the sanctioned "proof positively complete, sync missed it" override.
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`: **refreshed the stale `% NOTE: \lean{}
  target to be built iter-027`** ‚Üí records DELIVERED + axiom-clean + the `\leanok`-override rationale.

## sync_leanok
- iter-027 (sha 4f10a69): added 0 / removed 0 / no corruption / chapters_touched: []. The 11-iter
  over-strip/corruption streak (iters 013‚Üí023) stays ended (3rd consecutive clean iter, 025/026/027). The
  one `\leanok` the deterministic script *should* have added (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`) it skipped
  due to the over-bundled `\uses` ‚Äî applied manually above.

## Blueprint doctor (iter-027) ‚Äî all out-of-cone, deferred to merge-back
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` `% covers` two nonexistent files; 14 broken `\ref` in same chapter; 4
  broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`; 13 broken `\cref` in `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`. All are
  merge-back EXTRACTION artifacts outside the 3-seed cone (unchanged, iters 011‚Üí027). No new findings in the
  SectionGradedRing cone.

## Recommendation headline
Deliverable shipped. Next critical-path item is the **GCommSemiring** (invertible `L`), which is gated on
re-signing `IsInvertible` to carry a trivializing cover as DATA (Stacks 01CR) before `Œ≤_{L,L}=ùüô` can descend.
See `recommendations.md`.
